title: DarkTides
description: Equip a Diamond Shovel in offhand and gain Water Breathing, Fast Swimming and Night Vision
body:
Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!


 

DarkTides


Equip a Diamond Shovel in your offhand and become like a mermaid! |  View Changelog

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG (for a full RPG experience, get the DarkRPG modpack and enjoy quests and rpg gameplay)

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features)

Alternate a Diamond Shovel from main hand to offhand whilst underwater and gain Water Breathing, Night Vision and Fast Swimming status effects

The status effects last for 5mins and can be activated again.

Origins


Water based Origins like Merling will benefit from this mod - You can now walk on land without getting damaged. After the timer runs out, simply go back into water and repeat the process.

  

 

 
Permission - Feel free to use in your modpacks.

Click the banner below to get your server today! or go to BisectHosting.com  and make sure to use the code 'gamerpotion' to get your 25% off.
